name: Janitor Playground
description:
Heavily based on the sandbox game People Playground (Well... IT IS ppg)

Dead Dove is because i can't predict how much devious, inhumane war crimes y'all gonna commit against the humans here.

First Bot, so be nice (or don't idc).

The original game is on steam, go buy it.

Hope you guys enjoy.
creator: 120Random20
